title: Recruitment for a Pharmaceutical Quality Assessor
body: "We have a vacancy for a Pharmaceutical Quality Assessor.  Job Title  Pharmaceutical Quality Assessor  Grade  SSO  Salary & Pension  £46,060 per annum with Pension Scheme  Annual Leave entitlement  Commencing at 25 days  Role  You will be a member of the Quality team, one of three specialist teams within the Pharmaceuticals Section, which is in turn part of the Authorisations Division.  The main role of the Quality team is to assess quality data submitted by companies in support of their application for marketing authorisations for veterinary medicines, and applications to vary these authorisations.    The Quality team also has a significant role in the delivery of the VMD’s regulatory science strategy, development of regulatory and scientific guidelines, assessment of product defects, and supporting delivery of the VMD’s international activities, including training other veterinary medicines regulators.   How to apply  You must make your application via Pharmaceutical Quality Assessor - Civil Service Jobs - GOV.UK where you will find a full job description.  Closing Date  12 January 2026 "
